case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PHILIDELPHIA REINSURANCE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHILIDELPHIA REINSURANCE CORPORATION $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,225.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
